_comment: Generated by scripts/build-alias-shards.mjs from data/search/aliases.json (the authoring master). Runtime shard for group Q: app.js ensureAliases fetches every group's shard in parallel on first search interaction. Do not edit by hand; edit the master and rerun the script.
